extra_active: Extra active (Very hard exercise or twice a day)
dietary_subheader: Please select all that apply to you.
Balanced_detail: Balanced routine of eating to support energy, satiety, and general health balanced on a sustained basis from carbohydrates, protein, and fats.
Moderate_detail: More performance-focused approach to promote steadier blood sugar, controlled hunger, and consistent energy levels.
High Protein_detail: Considers protein a key player in muscle growth and recovery, fullness and body composition while keeping carbs and fats at moderate levels.
Ketogenic_detail: Greatly reduces carbohydrates so the body relies more on fat for fuel, supporting appetite control and ketosis.
error_fill_out_all_fields: Please correctly fill out all fields.
